'''鈭歝h-z-d''' ('''chazada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulpiteer|pulpiteer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulpiteer|pulpiteer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| chazada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazadithi|chazadithi]] || [[word:chazadiji|chazadiji]] || [[word:chazadishi|chazadishi]] || [[word:chazadi|chazadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazaduthuth|chazaduthuth]] || [[word:chazadujuj|chazadujuj]] || [[word:chazadushush|chazadushush]] || [[word:chazad|chazad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazaduthu|chazaduthu]] || [[word:chazaduju|chazaduju]] || [[word:chazadushu|chazadushu]] || [[word:chazadu|chazadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazadufuth|chazadufuth]] || [[word:chazadufuj|chazadufuj]] || [[word:chazadufush|chazadufush]] || [[word:chazaduf|chazaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazadethe|chazadethe]] || [[word:chazadeje|chazadeje]] || [[word:chazadeshe|chazadeshe]] || [[word:chazade|chazade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazadothoth|chazadothoth]] || [[word:chazadojoj|chazadojoj]] || [[word:chazadoshosh|chazadoshosh]] || [[word:chazad|chazad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazadotho|chazadotho]] || [[word:chazadojo|chazadojo]] || [[word:chazadosho|chazadosho]] || [[word:chazado|chazado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazadofoth|chazadofoth]] || [[word:chazadofoj|chazadofoj]] || [[word:chazadofosh|chazadofosh]] || [[word:chazadof|chazadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazad忙th忙|chazad忙th忙]] || [[word:chazad忙j忙|chazad忙j忙]] || [[word:chazad忙sh忙|chazad忙sh忙]] || [[word:chazad忙|chazad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazadathath|chazadathath]] || [[word:chazadajaj|chazadajaj]] || [[word:chazadashash|chazadashash]] || [[word:chazad|chazad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazadatha|chazadatha]] || [[word:chazadaja|chazadaja]] || [[word:chazadasha|chazadasha]] || [[word:chazada|chazada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazadafath|chazadafath]] || [[word:chazadafaj|chazadafaj]] || [[word:chazadafash|chazadafash]] || [[word:chazadaf|chazadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chazadasha|chazadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochazadasha|gochazadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichazadasha|gokichazadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chazadn眉sha|chazadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochazadnkn眉sha|gochazadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichazadn眉sha|gokichazadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chazadsh毛sha|chazadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochazadnksh毛sha|gochazadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichazadsh毛sha|gokichazadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chazadrosha|chazadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochazadnkrosha|gochazadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichazadrosha|gokichazadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chazadmusha|chazadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazadnkmusha|gochazadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazadmusha|gokichazadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chazadsherasha|chazadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochazadnksherasha|gochazadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichazadsherasha|gokichazadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chazadngasha|chazadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochazadnkngasha|gochazadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichazadngasha|gokichazadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chazadyasha|chazadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochazadnkyasha|gochazadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichazadyasha|gokichazadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chazadyamasha|chazadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochazadnkyamasha|gochazadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichazadyamasha|gokichazadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chazadn眉sh毛sha|chazadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochazadnkn眉sh毛sha|gochazadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichazadn眉sh毛sha|gokichazadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chazadn眉rosha|chazadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochazadnkn眉rosha|gochazadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichazadn眉rosha|gokichazadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazadn眉musha|chazadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazadnkn眉musha|gochazadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazadn眉musha|gokichazadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chazadsh毛n眉sha|chazadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochazadnksh毛n眉sha|gochazadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichazadsh毛n眉sha|gokichazadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chazadsh毛rosha|chazadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochazadnksh毛rosha|gochazadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichazadsh毛rosha|gokichazadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazadsh毛musha|chazadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazadnksh毛musha|gochazadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazadsh毛musha|gokichazadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chazadron眉sha|chazadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochazadnkron眉sha|gochazadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichazadron眉sha|gokichazadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chazadrosh毛sha|chazadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochazadnkrosh毛sha|gochazadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichazadrosh毛sha|gokichazadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazadromusha|chazadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazadnkromusha|gochazadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazadromusha|gokichazadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chazadmun眉sha|chazadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochazadnkmun眉sha|gochazadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichazadmun眉sha|gokichazadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chazadmush毛sha|chazadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochazadnkmush毛sha|gochazadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichazadmush毛sha|gokichazadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chazadmurosha|chazadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochazadnkmurosha|gochazadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichazadmurosha|gokichazadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chazad|chazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙z忙d|ch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochazad|hochazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙z忙d|hoch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochazad|hohochazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙z忙d|hohoch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chazad|n眉chazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙z忙d|n眉ch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chazad|n眉n眉chazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙z忙d|n眉n眉ch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chazad|n茂chazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙z忙d|n茂ch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chazad|n茂n茂chazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙z忙d|n茂n茂ch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchazad|luchazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙z忙d|luch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchazad|luluchazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙z忙d|luluch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichazad|lichazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙z忙d|lich忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichazad|lilichazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙z忙d|lilich忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochazad|kochazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙z忙d|koch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochazad|kokochazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙z忙d|kokoch忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechazad|kechazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙z忙d|kech忙z忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechazad|kekechazad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙z忙d|kekech忙z忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
